case_title: JOHNNIE RAY BLAYLOCK VS. AISHA BUTTS et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAYLOCK, JOHNNIE RAY AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPKINS, THEOPHILUS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPKINS, THEOPHILUS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,623.79 FILED BY BLAYLOCK, JOHNNIE RAY AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTS, AISHA THOMPKINS, THEOPHILUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO AISHA BUTTS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-16-2011 AT 10:00AM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-28-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. MEDIATED SETTLEMENT FOR $1150.00 TO BE PAID BY THEOPOLIS THOMPKINS IN INSTALLMENTS OF $150.00 PER MONTH UNTIL PAID. IF NO APPEARANCE ON NOVEMBER 28, 2011 AT 1:30 PM, CONTINUE FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS FOR PROGRESS REPORT. THE CLAIM AGAINST AISHA BUTTS IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PARTIES REQUEST. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT THEOPOLIS THOMPKINS WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-21-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
